title: selago verna
intro: Selago verna, also known as blue devil or blue dragon flower, is a flowering plant species in the family Scrophulariaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which can help to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia. The medicinal properties of Selago verna have been found to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and soothing sore throats. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or decoction for its medicinal uses, and it is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
